sections.heading: About Facciano HVAC and Sheet Metal
body: Facciano HVAC and Sheet Metal is a family-run heating, cooling, and custom sheet metal contractor based in Santa Rosa, California. Operating since 2015, the company is licensed by the California Contractors State License Board for both Warm-Air Heating, Ventilating & Air Conditioning and Sheet Metal work — meaning the ductwork and metal that go into a job can be fabricated by the same crew that installs it.

Run by the Facciano family, with Mark and Tony Facciano handling work in the field, the shop serves homeowners and businesses across Sonoma County. Customers note prompt response and fair pricing — when a rodent chewed through one homeowner's condensation line, the team came right over, fixed it, and surprised the customer with their rates.
highlights: CSLB licensed contractor (license #1009408) — Warm-Air Heating, Ventilating & Air Conditioning plus Sheet Metal (C-20 / C-43)
In business in Santa Rosa since 2015
Custom sheet metal fabrication and ductwork done in-house
Heating and air conditioning install, repair, and service

sections.heading: Heating, cooling, and custom metal — under one roof

items.title: Heating Installation & Repair
items.description: Furnace and heating system installation, replacement, and repair for homes and businesses in the Santa Rosa area.

items.title: Air Conditioning
items.description: AC installation, replacement, and service to keep Sonoma County properties comfortable through the hot months.

items.title: Custom Sheet Metal Fabrication
items.description: In-house custom sheet metal work for HVAC and beyond, fabricated to fit the job rather than forced from off-the-shelf parts.

items.title: Ductwork
items.description: Design, fabrication, repair, and replacement of duct systems for efficient, balanced airflow throughout the building.

items.title: Ventilation
items.description: Ventilation and air-handling solutions for residential and commercial spaces.

items.title: Residential & Commercial Service
items.description: HVAC service and repair calls for both homes and commercial properties across Santa Rosa and Sonoma County.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

items.quote: I had a rodent chew through the condensation line to my heating system and Mark and Tony came right over to assess the situation. They fixed the issue and I was pleasantly surprised by their rates.
items.author: Santa Rosa homeowner

sections.heading: Work with Facciano HVAC and Sheet Metal
